disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: WHO says new hantavirus case among Hondius ship's crew - Medical Xpress
updates.body_en: WHO says new hantavirus case among Hondius ship's crew Medical Xpress
updates.summary_zh: WHO 通报 Hondius 号邮轮船员新增汉坦病例。

updates.body_en: Ontario man tests negative for Ebola; no further cases of hantavirus confirmed in Canada Yahoo News Canada

updates.summary_zh: 研究显示美国太平洋西北部分地区汉坦病毒高流行。

updates.body_en: Polish captain of hantavirus-hit ship to return home after negative tests TVP World
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦疫情影响的波兰籍船长检测阴性后回国。

updates.body_en: WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称荷兰发现第12例汉坦感染者。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Final 14 days of home quarantine for negative cases Euronews
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦阴性病例需居家隔离最后14天。

updates.body_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha WOWT

updates.title_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation - The Telegraph

updates.summary_zh: 荷兰邮轮一名船员汉坦病毒检测阳性，已隔离。

updates.title_en: Canada’s top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today - CityNews Toronto
updates.body_en: Canada’s top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today CityNews Toronto No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola Radio-Canada
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席公共卫生官通报无新增汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada - St. Catharines Standard
updates.body_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada St. Catharines Standard
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大尼亚加拉官员称汉坦病毒风险低，但保持监测。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮关联汉坦病毒病例升至12例，一名船员阳性。

updates.body_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 Anadolu Ajansı

updates.body_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case Devdiscourse
